macros/cents_to_dollars.sql.purpose_statement: Provides a standardized way to convert monetary values from cents to dollars across different database platforms, ensuring consistent financial calculations throughout the organization's data models.

semantic_evidence.description: Macro definition with adapter-specific implementations for converting cents to dollars: default__cents_to_dollars, postgres__cents_to_dollars, bigquery__cents_to_dollars, fabric__cents_to_dollars

macros/generate_schema_name.sql.purpose_statement: Controls database schema naming conventions to organize data assets appropriately based on environment and resource type, ensuring proper data governance and separation of raw versus processed data.

semantic_evidence.description: Macro with conditional logic for schema naming: seeds go to 'raw' schema, custom schemas prepended with default in prod, default target schema for non-prod environments
